suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce backend-test-worker completion checks so handoffs cannot claim followedProcedure=true when an expectedBehavior bullet was only inferred from existing coverage instead of being proven by an explicit acceptance assertion and correct implementation commit reference.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Original handoff /Users/opentoggl-ci/.factory/missions/e037dfea-351f-4685-b798-ddaaec9dfb1c/handoffs/2026-03-25T01-54-41-180Z__tracking-supported-start-entrypoints-conflict-proof__6e224639-1599-40de-983d-703c04379571.json cites commit b2ca481, while commit 28f9318 adds the actual no-persistence assertions in apps/backend/internal/tracking/application/regressions_test.go:93-110.
